steps.assistant_content_head:
I'll create a responsive portfolio website homepage for a UX designer according to the specifications.

First, I'll write the HTML file with inline CSS and JavaScript:

tool_calls.name: write_file
tool_calls.content_head:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>DesignDepth - UX Designer Portfolio</title>

steps.assistant_content_head: I need to complete the HTML file by adding the missing JavaScript for the mobile menu functionality and ensure all the SVG icons are properly defined. Let me fix this and then render the page to verify it meets the specifications.

tool_calls.name: write_file
tool_calls.content_head:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>DesignDepth - UX Designer Portfolio</title>

steps.assistant_content_head: I need to complete the SVG paths for the social media icons and add the JavaScript for the mobile menu functionality. Let me fix this and then render the page to verify it meets the specifications.
